title: BillyRendering
description: A port of SillyRendering for b1.7.3 Babric.
body:
# BillyRendering
(epilepsy warning)

A mod for b1.7.3 Babric that randomizes vertex positions resulting in weird results. Causes flickering on the GUI and main menu.

Note that this uses zero code from [SillyRendering](https://modrinth.com/mod/sillyrendering), just the idea.

Should be compatible with every mod, tested with StationAPI and UniTweaks.
